---
title: ""
draft: false
---

# Academic Life 📚

- If you want to see my slides and talks [filippogambarota/slides](https://filippogambarota.github.io/slides)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6666-1747) `r fontawesome::fa("orcid")`
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Filippo-Gambarota) `r fontawesome::fa("researchgate")`
- Check my [CV](https://filippogambarota.github.io/cv/)

# Social Media

I'm trying to declutter social media (without a great success Tbh 😵) however you can find me on:

- [Twitter](https://twitter.com/fgambarota) `r fontawesome::fa("twitter")`
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/filippogambarota/) `r fontawesome::fa("instagram")`
- I'm a TV-Shows addicted 😵! Check my [**Trakt**](https://trakt.tv/users/filippo-gambarota) profile

<a class="twitter-timeline" data-width="500" data-height="400" href="https://twitter.com/fgambarota?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw">Tweets by fgambarota</a>
<script async src="https://platform.twitter.com/widgets.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
